input.resume_text:
Taylor Sample
Raleigh, NC, United States

Frontend developer with 4 years of experience building accessible web applications, React components, TypeScript interfaces, design-system documentation, automated UI tests, and customer-facing dashboards. Recent work includes improving page performance, fixing usability issues, reviewing pull requests, and partnering with product designers. Looking for remote frontend developer, UI engineer, or full-stack developer roles. Prefers base salary above 100000 USD.
